loadError.title: Could not load this file
loadError.description: We couldn't read "{{fileName}}" from disk. Saving is disabled until the file loads successfully, so we don't overwrite your real content.

footer.shortcuts: Press Ctrl+S to save • Esc to close

binaryFile.title: Binary File
binaryFile.message: The file "{{fileName}}" cannot be displayed in the text editor because it is a binary file.
